results.title: Phase 1 setup-first planning refinement
results.content: For rental-management-ui, the user clarified that the first implementation focus should be tech stack setup, project scaffold, and project styling before deeper API work. Instead of inserting a pre-Phase-1 decimal phase, the safe planning move was to reframe Phase 1 itself and create 01-CONTEXT plus 01-01/01-02/01-03 plans covering project scaffold/providers, design tokens and shell, then auth pages and protected routing. STATE and .continue-here were updated so the next execution step is 01-01-PLAN.md while Phase 01.1 remains queued for typed API integration.

results.title: Resume state on 2026-04-01
results.content: Resumed rental-management-ui with .planning/STATE.md present, no HANDOFF.json on disk, no interrupted agent, and .continue-here checkpoint in Phase 01. Current recommended next action is execute Plan 01-02 for style system and shell foundations. Working tree is dirty: .planning/PROJECT.md and .planning/STATE.md updated for resume continuity, yarn.lock modified, .planning/HANDOFF.json deleted, and .coder/ is untracked.

results.title: Docs refactor: split progress trackers by phase
results.content: Refactored monolithic docs/TASK_BREAKDOWN.md and docs/PROJECT_PROGRESS.md into an index + overview model. Added docs/progress/ with phase- and phase-part-specific markdown tables, each row linking to related requirements, design, architecture, or test docs to keep task context clean. Root docs now route readers into the relevant phase tracker instead of carrying the full backlog inline.

results.title: content_template layered refactor
results.content: Refactored module/content_template to follow usecase -> service -> repository. Moved create/update/get/clone/setDefault/delete persistence and company ownership checks into ContentTemplateService/ContentTemplateServiceImpl, updated repository queries to be company-scoped, updated use case signatures to pass companyId, and forced controller list/get/update/delete/clone flows to use path companyId rather than raw template id or filter input alone. Files: content_template/entity/service/ContentTemplateService.java, infrastructure/service/ContentTemplateServiceImpl.java, infrastructure/config/repository/ContentTemplateRepository.java, infrastructure/controller/ContentTemplateController.java, usecase/*.java, infrastructure/usecase/*.java.
